form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 7 at Turfway Park on March 20 over 1609m, 7 len behind Silver Quarters with 55kg at $9.65. The start before that second last of 8 at Turfway Park on February 26 over 1609m, 21 len behind Gucci Man with 55kg at $10.34. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Delta Downs January 2 over 1308m, 32 len behind Timehascome with 55.5kg at $3.20. First up last campaign third of 8 at Churchill Downs June 13 over 1106m, on heavy track; 3 len behind Chado carrying 53.5kg at $9.64. Not without claims.

form.formComment: At the latest run 3rd of 8 at Turfway Park on March 21 over 1207m, 2.75 len behind Hogie The Player carrying 56kg at $24.04. The run before that 6th of 9 at Turfway Park on February 26 over 1207m, 6 len behind Willie Bird carrying 55kg at $4.41. Working up to a win. Worth following.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 3rd of 8 at Fairgrounds on March 7 over 1207m, 3.5 len behind Carambaso carrying 55kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 4th of 8 at Oaklawn Park on January 31 2025 over 1207m, 9 len behind Bourbon Heist with 55kg at $41.60. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resumes off a 36 day letup. First-up came from midfield and won by 1.5 len at Turfway Park February 13 over 1207m defeating Bucyk carrying 56kg at $7.02. Last start ran last of 7 at Turfway Park on March 5 over 1207m, 31 len behind Fond Farewell carrying 57kg at $8.77. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Comes off a 50 day let-up. Last start ran on from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Fairgrounds Turf on February 19 over 1609m, 5 len behind Calibrate carrying 55kg at $23. Before that 5th of 8 at Fairgrounds Turf on January 29 over 1609m, 2.75 len behind Contemplation with 55kg at $9.80. Among the winning chances.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 33-day let-up. At the latest run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Fairgrounds on March 8 over 1609m, 6 len behind Kavod with 55kg at $3.20. The race before that 3rd in a small field at Fairgrounds on February 6 over 1710m, 3.5 len behind Glen Airy with 55kg at $3.30. Making headway. Likely to measure up again.
